_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin is a potent inhibitor of glioma growth.

_contextSnippet: human glioma cell lines, such as U87MG, U251, SF763, and SF767 that are capable of forming subcutaneous and/or intracranial tumors in immunodeficient Rag-1 mice, expressed lower levels of merlin
details: Expressed very low levels of endogenous merlin and/or phosphorylated/inactive form of merlin; capable of forming subcutaneous and intracranial tumors
